issues.title: observability (T. Graf)
issues.author: boucadair
issues.body:
> Dear opsawg,
> 
> I support the adoption and think draft-boucla-opsawg-ipfix-fixes should follow the adoption call next as well. Both are very valuable to keep the IPFIX registry up to date.
> 
> I agree with the author that IE6 tcpControlBits should mirror the TCP header flags registry (https://www.iana.org/assignments/tcp-parameters/tcp-parameters.xhtml#tcp-header-flags). 
> 
> With this update network operators understand when packets are being observed with bit 7 set which application in the network should be upgraded to reflect the change being introduced with RFC 8311.
> 
> I suggest in the introduction to take the angle of correct observability vs. TCP protocol interoperability to describe the motivation.
> 
> Best wishes
> Thomas
